Usage: gs upstack (us) sync (sy) [flags]

Pull remote-side commits for a branch and those above it

Pull remote-side commits for the current branch and all branches upstack from
it. Branches that fast-forward (or rebase, with --rebase) trigger an upstack
restack of their children so the stack stays coherent. Use --branch to start at
a different branch.

Flags:
  --branch=NAME    Branch to start at
  --rebase         On divergence, replay remote-side commits onto local.

Global Flags:
  -h, --help           Show help for the command
      --version        Print version information and quit
  -v, --verbose        Enable verbose output ($GIT_SPICE_VERBOSE)
  -C, --dir=DIR        Change to DIR before doing anything
      --[no-]prompt    Whether to prompt for missing information
